elements.original_description: A small, flat piggy bank sitting on a white surface, with a tiny coin inside and a faint, barely visible arrow pointing upwards labeled 'interest'. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
elements.image_prompt: Professional 2D minimalist icon of a small, flat piggy bank sitting on a pure white background, with a tiny coin inside and a faint, barely visible upward-pointing arrow labeled 'interest'. Clean flat vector art, high contrast, no shading or gradients, no text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks. The scene conveys a feeling of negligible or minimal growth.
